AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.paragraph1: Hello, my name is Taiga Shiokawa. I'm a full-stack web engineer with 2 years of professional experience specializing in both frontend and backend development.
AboutPage.paragraph2: My expertise centers around modern web development using React, Next.js, and Node.js. I particularly focus on performance optimization and enhancing user experience, always striving to achieve clients' business objectives through technology.
AboutPage.paragraph3: Throughout my career, I've worked on various projects including landing page and website development using both pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript and modern frameworks like Next.js, E-commerce site modifications, building internal information management systems, and developing tools to improve workplace efficiency.
AboutPage.paragraph4: Currently, while working as a company employee in web development, I'm also pursuing service development as an independent developer. I implement "AI-driven development" by actively utilizing the latest AI technologies, which enables me to deliver value quickly while maintaining high-quality results.
AboutPage.paragraph5: My motto is "solving challenges through technology and accelerating clients' businesses." I propose optimal web solutions that combine the strengths of AI and human capabilities.
AboutPage.paragraph6: If you have any questions or would like to discuss a project, please feel free to contact me. I look forward to taking on new challenges together.

HomePage.description: "Taiga With..." is a technical blog and portfolio site where I share my knowledge and experience in software engineering. Through practical insights gained from daily development, technical explanations of programming concepts, and various project case studies, I aim to support the growth of fellow engineers. Let's learn together and explore the possibilities of technology at "Taiga With...".
